en: Here are 5 words that start with UNDER
UNDER can mean not enough or less than expected
ko: UNDER는 충분하지 않거나 기대보다 적다는 뜻이야.

en: not cooked enough I'm sorry but this pizza is a bit undercooked
ko: 충분히 익히지 않은. 미안한데 이 피자 좀 덜 익었어.

en: Underreaction underreaction a reaction with less emotion than expected I'm getting
ko: Underreaction, underreaction. 기대보다 적은 감정의 반응. 나 결혼

en: married Oh that's a bit of an underreaction
Understatement understatement a statement saying that something is less extreme than it really is
ko: Understatement, understatement. 실제보다 덜하다고 말하는 것.

en: It's quite warm in here That's a bit of an understatement It's absolutely boiling in here
ko: 여기 좀 따뜻하네. 좀 절제된 표현이야. 여기 완전 끓고 있거든.

en: achieve less than expected You're really underachieving You only answered one question in
ko: 기대보다 적게 성취하는 것. 너 정말 저성과야. 시험에서 문제 하나만

en: not valued highly enough This film is so underrated more people should know about it
ko: 충분히 높이 평가받지 못한. 이 영화 정말 저평가됐어. 더 많은 사람이 알아야 해.

en: What's the opposite of under Let us know in the comments
